heading: Maintenance of statistics by the Department of Homeland Security
label: 1380 Maintenance of statistics by the Department of Homeland Security
notes: References in TextThis subtitle, referred to in subsec. (b), means subtitle A (§§ 411–417) of title IV of div. J of . CodificationSection was enacted as part of the L–1 Visa (Intracompany Transferee) Reform Act of 2004, and also as part of the L–1 Visa and H–1B Visa Reform Act and the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2005, and not as part of the Immigration and Nationality Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Department of Homeland Security shall maintain statistics regarding petitions filed, approved, extended, and amended with respect to nonimmigrants described in , including the number of such nonimmigrants who are classified on the basis of specialized knowledge and the number of nonimmigrants who are classified on the basis of specialized knowledge in order to work primarily at offsite locations.section 1101(a)(15)(L) of this title

children.heading: Applicability
children.label: b Applicability
children.text: Subsection (a) shall apply to petitions filed on or after the effective date of this subtitle.
